mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdChgHist :: selectById */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM pdh_prod_chg_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id WHERE h.prod_chg_hist_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdChgHist :: selectPageCount */ FROM pdh_prod_chg_hist h
